title: pastinaca olgae
side_effects: Pastinaca olgae can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including diarrhea, nausea, and stomach cramps, due to its high concentration of furanocoumarins. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also lead to kidney damage and liver failure in severe cases. In some instances, ingesting the plant can cause allergic reactions, resulting in symptoms like hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. If not handled carefully, Pastinaca olgae can also cause skin irritation and contact dermatitis.
